entry.title: Re: A warm welcome to our new SAP Champions in January 2025
entry.content: Congratulations and welcome to all the new SAP Champions! 🎉 Happy to see many familiar faces joining the program. 😊

entry.title: Re: eclipse find&replace ignores paste command
entry.content:
To me it seems like this:

There was a bug that was fixed shortly before the release of 4.34.

But in editors from ADT, this bug is still present. Maybe they were built on top of Eclipse's code from before the fix.

You can see that it works in Eclipse's general editor when creating a text file from File -> New -> Other -> General -> Untitled Text File.

entry.title: Re: How to connect SAP Data Services to Dataverse
entry.content:
Hi there,

You should really use one of the variants above Web Services (WS), CSV files, or OData APIs. Might help with the description, hope it will help someone.

So if you are using Web Services to connect SAP data services to Dynamics 365, you can call this directly from SAP data services, primarily through OData or SOAP protocols, which can be consumed by data services. You`ll just need to identify the Web Service endpoint in Dynamics, receive all creds and links, configure the Web Service Connection in SAP data services inputting all info gathered from Dynamics and we`re ready. Use the Web Service in your dataflow, you can directly integrate the data from Dynamics 365 by pulling it through the defined WS API.

The second variant is using CSV Files to Transfer Data if you have some troubles with API`s. Just export all required data from Dynamics to CSV, if you want, you can even automate this process in Dynamics. Import CSV Files into SAP Data Services, Once the CSV files are available, you should create Flat File datastore in SAP Data Services, and select the directory where the exported CSV files are stored. And then dap the data. Import also may be automated through SAP Data Services scheduling tools to automate transformation, and loading (ETL) of data from CSV files.

If you need some help, I can suggest to you cool guys that I know, they have Dynamics integration specialists https://www.hiredynamicsdevelopers.com/dynamics-365-integration-services/, also they can help with research in extraordinary cases and automation.

entry.title: Authorisation 'Revoke status "Closed" depending on order type
entry.content:
Dear Team,

please not, we have the following authorisation requirement.

There are different types of maintenance order types like PM01, SM01 etc.

A user should be able to cancle the business completiton ('Revoke status "Closed") only for order type SM01.

I created a PFCG-role only with authorisation for IW32. In my role I have authorization object 'I_VORG_ORD' =>field: order type = SM01, field: BETRVORG = BUAB ('Revoke status "Closed").

I assigned the role to my test user. Unfortunately, the user can now 'Revoke status "Closed" in both order types, not for only SM01, as  expected.

Please advise how can I achive the restriction that the user can only 'Revoke status "Closed" depending on order type.

Feedback is highly appreciated!

Best Regards and thanks in advance.

Magdalena

entry.title: P/L report revenue is showing as negative
entry.content:
I am reviewing a Profit & Loss report in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud (FSV version FPA1) and I noticed that the Net Income is showing as a negative amount. I expected it to reflect a positive balance since this is revenue. 

Why is that?

entry.title: Re: Data Masking – a walk in the park with SAP Data Warehouse Cloud
entry.content:
Thanks for the blog @kpsauer ,

 

Data Ingestion & Data Consumption checkboxes are not available for me, If you know why? 

 

 

Thanks,
Lek

entry.title: Re: 2502 C4C Release Discussion
entry.content:
In 24011 Release Webinar it was published, that there wil be no further webinar for SAP C4C V1. Only blogbost on community page will tell us about content of the furture release. 
SAP told me that there will be blogspost at the end of this week.

entry.title: New Learning Experience - reassign surveys
entry.content:
Hi 🖐, 

I am writing this post to ask for your collaboration.

With the new learning experience, the reassign survey feature is not currently supported.

For example, if you want to verify the effectiveness of the training, by assigning a survey to a manager to evaluate his employees, and that manager leaves the company or changes position, you can assign the surveys to the new manager by using the reassign function.

We consider it an essential function that needs to be migrated before the final activation in H1 2025 of the new user experience.

Please take a moment to review the idea https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/339501, and if you agree that it would be beneficial to your team, vote for it! 🙏

The more votes we get, the greater the chance that SAP will take this suggestion into consideration 👊

Thank you very much for your help and collaboration 😉

entry.title: Re: MDM - IDoc CREMAS in error without any message - No T...
entry.content: I had this same error and in my case it was due to there being an active BTE that had a COMMIT that was executed in the middle of the BATCH INPUT execution, preventing it from reporting the correct completion message.

entry.title: Re: SAP CC: Is there a standard or built-in utility/tool...
entry.content:
Hello,

there is no tool that provide the feature that you have detailed.  I suggest you to ask SAP Center Of Expertise (CoE team) for consulting if you need some platform validation. In the same time you can submit your feature request to your SAP sale representative. The product team will study it and decide if it will be added in the next releases.

Best regards,

Eric F.

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud ALM and SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
Hello Thomas,

Thanks for your interest in SAP Cloud ALM and SAP Analytics Cloud.

The association between models can be build in a SAP Analytics Cloud Story using linked dimensions. For example, you can link Features and Requirements using the dimension "requirementId". The dimension "requirementId" is not yet available with Tasks.

Thanks,

Cyril

entry.title: SAP BPC End of Life (?)
entry.content:
Hello

I've read some articles talking about an SAP announcement that SAP BPC end of maintenance is planned for 2030. However I couldn't find a formal SAP announcement.

When is the end of maintenance on BPC expected to take place?

Thank you!

entry.title: Chinese OS - Number cannot show System Default Number Format
entry.content:
Hi Support,

Set the OS Number display(No. of digits after decimal）in Region as 0.0001.

And then show Totext(12.3456,"#.###"), it's always shows 12.35.

But in English OS + Crystal Report 2008  or Crystal Report 2016 works weel.

And in Chinese OS + Crystal Report 2008 also works well.

The problem happens in the same Chinese OS + Crystal Report 2016. How to fix this issue? Can you advice?

 

Best Regards,

Dory

entry.title: Chinese OS - Number cannot show System Default Number Format
entry.content:
Hi Support,

Set the OS Number display(No. of digits after decimal）in Region as 0.0001.

And then show Totext(12.3456,"#.###"), it's always shows 12.35.

But in English OS + Crystal Report 2008  or Crystal Report 2016 works weel.

And in Chinese OS + Crystal Report 2008 also works well.

The problem happens in the same Chinese OS + Crystal Report 2016. How to fix this issue? Can you advice?

 

Best Regards,

Dory

entry.title: Master database creation failed for SAP ASE 16.0 SP03 PL10 in SUSE Linux 15.5
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm trying to create new SAP ASE server in SUSE Linux 15.5 (AWS EC2 instance) manually. Doing fresh installation.

While installing(command:  $SYBASE/$SYBASE_ASE/bin/srvbuildres -r $SetupDir/${DSQUERY}.rs) ASE 16.0 SP03 PL10 in "SUSE Linux Enterprise Server 15 SP5", master device installation is not completing.

In log I can see below error.

What is the issue? Am i missing something (e.g. any library...)

It is and AWS EC2 instance. Log snippet:

-----------------------------------

00:0000:00000:00000:2025/01/23 09:09:37.16 kernel  Loaded encryption provider CommonCryptoLib 8.5.21 (), CryptoKernel version 8.5.21.
00:0000:00000:00000:2025/01/23 09:09:37.16 kernel  INFORMATION: The FIPS Certified Crypto Kernel is not enabled.
00:0000:00000:00000:2025/01/23 09:09:37.16 kernel  Begin processing to generate RSA keypair.
00:0000:00000:00000:2025/01/23 09:09:37.19 kernel  Completed processing to generate RSA keypair.
00:0006:00000:00000:2025/01/23 09:09:37.19 kernel  ASE - Dynamic Pluggable Component Interface is disabled
00:0006:00000:00000:2025/01/23 09:09:37.19 kernel  Thread 6 (LWP 2299) of Threadpool syb_default_pool online as engine 0
00:0006:00000:00000:2025/01/23 09:09:37.19 kernel  bucket manager consolidator online
00:0006:00000:00000:2025/01/23 09:09:37.21 kernel  Current process (0x30002) infected with signal 11 (SIGSEGV)
00:0006:00000:00000:2025/01/23 09:09:37.21 kernel  Current Process is running on Engine 0
00:0006:00000:00000:2025/01/23 09:09:37.21 kernel  server is using elf symbols for stack decoding (125635 symbols found)
00:0006:00000:00000:2025/01/23 09:09:37.21 kernel  Address 0x0x00007f7690089410 (), siginfo (code, address) = (2, 0x0x00007f7690089410)
00:0006:00000:00000:2025/01/23 09:09:37.21 kernel  **** Saved signal context (0x0x0000000148502dc0): ****
00:0006:00000:00000:2025/01/23 09:09:37.21 kernel  uc_flags: 0x7, uc_link: 0x(nil)
00:0006:00000:00000:2025/01/23 09:09:37.21 kernel  uc_sigmask: 0x7bfbf037 0xb 0x2 0x90089410
00:0006:00000:00000:2025/01/23 09:09:37.21 kernel  uc_stack: ss_sp: 0x(nil), ss_size: 0x0, ss_flags: 0x2
00:0006:00000:00000:2025/01/23 09:09:37.21 kernel  General Registers (uc_mcontext.gregs):
00:0006:00000:00000:2025/01/23 09:09:37.21 kernel       PC : 0x00007f7690089410 ()
00:0006:00000:00000:2025/01/23 09:09:37.21 kernel          RAX : 0x00007f7690089410  RBX : 0x00007f769000c3b0
00:0006:00000:00000:2025/01/23 09:09:37.21 kernel          RCX : 0x0000000000000003  RDX : 0x00007f7690143b00
00:0006:00000:00000:2025/01/23 09:09:37.21 kernel       RBP : 0x0000000148503e90  RSP : 0x0000000148503348
00:0006:00000:00000:2025/01/23 09:09:37.21 kernel       R8  : 0x0000000000000002  R9  : (nil)
00:0006:00000:00000:2025/01/23 09:09:37.21 kernel       R10 : 0x0000000000000001  R11 : 0x00007f76b0defaae
00:0006:00000:00000:2025/01/23 09:09:37.21 kernel       R12 : 0x00007f7690089410  R13 : 0x00007f76900022c0
00:0006:00000:00000:2025/01/23 09:09:37.21 kernel       R14 : 0x00000001485038d0  R15 : 0x00000001485038c0
00:0006:00000:00000:2025/01/23 09:09:37.21 kernel       RDI : 0x00007f76b16d55c0  RSI : 0x00007f7690093d70
00:0006:00000:00000:2025/01/23 09:09:37.21 kernel       RIP : 0x00007f7690089410  CSGSFS : 0x002b000000000033
00:0006:00000:00000:2025/01/23 09:09:37.21 kernel       TRAPNO : 0x000000000000000e  ERR : 0x0000000000000015
00:0006:00000:00000:2025/01/23 09:09:37.21 kernel       EFL : 0x0000000000010202
00:0006:00000:00000:2025/01/23 09:09:37.21 kernel  **** end of signal context ****
00:0006:00000:00000:2025/01/23 09:09:37.21 kernel  pc: 0x000000000156418a pcstkwalk+0x487()
00:0006:00000:00000:2025/01/23 09:09:37.21 kernel  pc: 0x0000000001563b32 ucstkgentrace+0x212()
00:0006:00000:00000:2025/01/23 09:09:37.21 kernel  pc: 0x0000000001560272 ucbacktrace+0x54()

00:0006:00000:00000:2025/01/23 09:09:37.21 kernel  pc: 0x00000000021f931b Snap::Validate()+0x3b()
00:0006:00000:00000:2025/01/23 09:09:37.21 kernel  pc: 0x000000000186381d SnapValidation+0xfd()
00:0006:00000:00000:2025/01/23 09:09:37.21 kernel  pc: 0x00000000008d8cc1 dsinit+0x1841()
00:0006:00000:00000:2025/01/23 09:09:37.21 kernel  end of stack trace, kernel service process: kpid 196610
00:0005:00000:00000:2025/01/23 09:10:02.09 kernel  Adaptive Server had 28634 major and 5551 minor page faults since boot, and 28634 major and 5551 minor page faults in last 25000 milliseconds.

------------------------------------------------------------------

But in another Suse Linux server(not EC2 instance), where the master got created successfully log shows like below:

----------------------------------------------

00:0000:00000:00000:2024/07/13 12:35:19.53 kernel  Loaded encryption provider CommonCryptoLib 8.5.21 (), CryptoKernel version 8.5.21.
00:0000:00000:00000:2024/07/13 12:35:19.53 kernel  INFORMATION: The FIPS Certified Crypto Kernel is not enabled.

00:0002:00000:00000:2024/07/13 12:35:19.54 kernel  ASE - Dynamic Pluggable Component Interface is disabled
00:0002:00000:00000:2024/07/13 12:35:19.54 kernel  Thread 2 (LWP 8274) of Threadpool syb_default_pool online as engine 0
00:0002:00000:00000:2024/07/13 12:35:19.54 kernel  bucket manager consolidator online
00:0002:00000:00000:2024/07/13 12:35:19.56 server  No active traceflags
00:0002:00000:00002:2024/07/13 12:35:19.57 kernel  libomni1 - Component Integration Services: using 'SAP Client-Library/16.0 SP03 PL10/P-EBF29829/DRV.16.0.03.10/Linux x86_64/Linux 2.6.18-128.el5 x86_64 Native Threads/BUILD1600-027/64bit/OPT/Tue Apr  6 02:40:20 2021'

00:0002:00000:00002:2024/07/13 12:35:19.98 server  Size of the 2K memory pool for each cachelet (default data cache, total cachelets:4 😞 1434112 Kb
00:0002:00000:00002:2024/07/13 12:35:19.98 server  Size of the 16K memory pool for each cachelet (dbccdb_cache, total cachelets:1 😞 10240 Kb
00:0002:00000:00002:2024/07/13 12:35:19.98 server  Size of the 2K memory pool for each cachelet (dbccdb_cache, total cachelets:1 😞 30720 Kb
00:0002:00000:00002:2024/07/13 12:35:19.98 server  Opening Master Database ...
00:0002:00000:00002:2024/07/13 12:35:20.00 server  Loading ASE's default sort order and character set

00:0002:00000:00002:2024/07/13 12:35:20.00 server  Completed estimating recovery log boundaries for database 'master'.

00:0002:00000:00002:2024/07/13 12:35:20.00 server  Log contains all committed transactions until 2024/07/13 12:32:37.18 for database master.
00:0002:00000:00002:2024/07/13 12:35:20.00 server  Started REDO pass for database 'master'. The total number of log records to process is 1.
00:0002:00000:00002:2024/07/13 12:35:20.00 server  Completed REDO pass for database 'master'.

-----------------------------------------------------------------------

SAP ASE - HADR Enablement

entry.title: How can I call a destination subaccount via CAP
entry.content:
Hi,

I am trying to link a sub-account destination via CAP. Using the xs-app.json file, the file cannot find the destination, returning a 404 not found:

Console:

Destination:

xs-app.json

I have read that you cannot use xs-app.json in a CAP application, so I wanted to know if there is another method to call a sub-account destination.

Thank you,
regards.

Emanuele

entry.title: Re: RAP App with Read-only root entity
entry.content:
@brunobrito2 

How about using Unmanaged Save? With this, you don't have to specify persistent tables and can implement your own logic for saving data. I've used Unmanage Save for implementing actions on entities based on  standard CDS views.

entry.title: Re: Not able to connect to system while creating a projec...
entry.content:
Hi @Anjan_3331 Please try login into CF account first in BAS and then try again.

Hope this helps…

Thanks-

entry.title: Sending files from different folders/directories at a time through single SFTP sender channel.
entry.content:
Hello SAPians,

I have a requirement where there will be 3 different folders in  AL11. I have to fetch files from these 3 folders at a time and send it to the receiver using SFTP sender channel. I have to send all this files at a time using single sender channel. If not SFTP, pls suggest the correct way.

Thanks in advance 🙂
SAP Cloud Platform, industry edition, client libraries SAP BTP, ABAP environment SAP Integration Suite Cloud Integration SAP Business Technology Platform

entry.title: intercompany Preq generates a requirement before conversion
entry.content:
my scenario is the following:

we have intercompany plants A and B.

plant A purchases material from plant B according to requirement.

my problem:

when plant A has a requirement, a Purchase requisition is generated in MRP but, the planned order in plant B is generated immediately, before the Preq of plant A is converted in PO!!

I do not seem to find the settings for this, can someone help?

entry.title: The CMS system database is not available. (FWM 02088)
entry.content:
Hi Colleagues,

I got this error when I Log On to SAP Information Steward:

The CMS system database is not available. The error cannot be rectified by the end user. Please report this error to your system or database administrator. (FWM 02088) Enter your user information and click Log On. (If you are unsure of your account information, contact your system administrator.)

More details:

production version: version=4.2.14

we should have these DB and they are on the same host

  1. Amazon Redshift
  2. MSSQL
  3. MySQL
  4. Oracle
  5. DB2
  6. SAP IQ

CMS_logging:

FILE_TYPE:DAAA96DE-B0FB-4c6e-AF7B-A445F5BF9BE2
ENCODING:UTF-8
RECORD_SEPARATOR:30
COLUMN_SEPARATOR:124
ESC_CHARACTER:27
COLUMNS:Location|Guid|Time|Tzone|Trace|Log|Importance|Severity|Exception|DeviceName|ProcessID|ThreadID|ThreadName|ScopeTag|MajorTick|MinorTick|MajorDepth|MinorDepth|RootName|RootID|CallerName|CallerID|CalleeName|CalleeID|ActionID|DSRRootContextID|DSRTransaction|DSRConnection|DSRCounter|User|ArchitectComponent|DeveloperComponent|Administrator|Unit|CSNComponent|Text
SEVERITY_MAP: |None| |Success|W|Warning|E|Error|A|Assertion
HEADER_END
ccc
NameServer.cpp:528:-: TraceLog message 34840
c).c
RecycleBinCleaner.cpp:158:-: TraceLog message 34841
|b2d1978b-8618-0074-ba6e-b109724bdfb0|2024 12 26 02:47:56:131|+0000|Error| |>>|E| |cms_DS42P82WINBOX.CentralManagementServer| 1464|3340|| ||||||||||||||||||||||assert failure: (RecycleBinCleaner.cpp:158). (false : RecycleBinCleaner::run: SAP BusinessObjects BI platform CMS: CMS system database "BI4_CMS_DSN" is not available. The error cannot be rectified by the end user. Please report this error to your system administrator or database administrator. (FWB 00024) No database connections remaining.

If you need more details please let me know.

Thanks,

Wei

entry.title: Re: Visual Studio code fiori application deployment fails with status code 500
entry.content: @Y_D_ABAPER Can you deploy with logging enabled and check the outputs? https://github.com/SAP/open-ux-tools/blob/main/packages/deploy-tooling/README.md#configuration-with-logging-enabled

entry.title: Re: A warm welcome to our new SAP Champions in January 2025

entry.title: Re: Form Entry Object Page: Elements are not editable
entry.content:
Hello @martinc_mb,

I am trying to design a form entry object page .
I can the see the element in DOM.
Backend call is also fine.

But UI is not rendering.

As I can see from your screenshot , Can you guide me achieve the same.

entry.title: Differences between Creating Purchase Orders and Purchase Requisitions in SAP
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I'm seeking to understand the distinctions between the functionalities for creating purchase orders and purchase requisitions within SAP. Could someone clarify the main differences in terms of their use, processes involved, and implications for inventory and financial management? Any insights into how these two functions integrate within the broader SAP system would also be greatly appreciated.

Thank you in advance for your help!

entry.title: Re: How to delete materials?
entry.content: Thank you so much

entry.title: SAP supports your transition to SAP Cloud ALM with SAP Readiness Check
entry.content:
One central topic on the SAP ALM Summit EMEA in autumn 2024 was the transition journey from SAP Solution Manager to SAP Cloud ALM, supported by SAP Readiness Check.

You may recap the the SAP ALM Summit EMEA sessions on youtube:

  • Fire up your transition journey with SAP Readiness Check for SAP Cloud ALM
  • What you need to know for a successful transition to SAP Cloud ALM
  • Prepare your transition from SAP Solution Manager to SAP Cloud ALM 

 

SAP Readiness Check for SAP Cloud ALM - Introduction

With SAP Readiness Check for SAP Cloud ALM, SAP provides a self-service tool to analyze an existing SAP Solution Manager system in preparation for a transition to SAP Cloud ALM. SAP Readiness Check for SAP Cloud ALM helps customers to better understand the usage of their SAP Solution Manager system, and to plan and scope the transition of application lifecycle management capabilities to SAP Cloud ALM. This transition can be performed either completely or by taking a capability-by-capability approach. SAP Readiness Check provides a mapping of equivalent capabilities between SAP Solution Manager and SAP Cloud ALM, while also showing the availability status of capabilities in SAP Cloud ALM. It also helps customers to engage with partners and SAP to discuss options for the most appropriate transition plan.

Learn more in this blog post and the following assets:

  • Get started with the SAP Readiness Check for SAP Cloud ALM (SAP Note 3236443)
  • E-Learning: Introduction to SAP Readiness Check for SAP Cloud ALM

 

SAP Activate Roadmap "Transition to SAP Cloud ALM"

The SAP Activate roadmap provides comprehensive guidance on the transition from SAP Solution Manager to SAP Cloud ALM in the well-known format of SAP Activate Best Practices. Read the Transition Planning deliverable in the Discover phase to learn how SAP Readiness Check supports the transition from SAP Solution Manager to SAP Cloud ALM, and the underlying tasks:

  1. Perform SAP Readiness Check for SAP Cloud ALM
  2. Define Project Scope and Objectives
  3. Define capability scope for transition to SAP Cloud ALM

Go to the SAP Activate Roadmap

 

Services for SAP Cloud ALM

SAP offers services which help you with your transition to SAP Cloud ALM:

  • Services for SAP Cloud ALM

Check the Application Lifecycle Management page for Transition to SAP Cloud ALM  to learn more, from the strategy overview and a functional comparison of SAP Solution Manager and SAP Cloud ALM, to recommended transition steps and transition support.

entry.title: ME11 创建采购信息记录时，如何设置有效的价格条件？
entry.content: 我正在使用 ME11 创建采购信息记录，但是对于如何设置合理有效的价格条件有些困惑。我想根据不同的采购数量设置不同的价格阶梯，并且考虑不同的折扣条件，但不太清楚如何准确地在采购信息记录中体现这些信息。能否有人给我一些详细的操作指导或示例，帮助我正确设置价格条件呢 谢谢！

entry.title: Use of Discontinued parts in MRP4 for informational use only?
entry.content:
Use of Discontinued parts in MRP4. My question is related to:
Concept of Discontinuation Data - Material Master ... - SAP Community
and
Discontinued Parts | SAP Help Portal

Can I use this feature stating:
- 1 at Discontinuation
- Effective date in the future (e.g. 2 years ahead), if implementation date is unknown.
- Update follow ip material.

 



If doing this, without updating any BOM at this stage (later doing the BOM update with local DCN) can it then be used as a flag that item will be superseded, and by which Material – to be used for informational needs only?

Clarification:

1.
If I have no idea when the actual new item will be implemented, would it then instead be possible to use this functionality as a signal only/information only about coming supersession? Means information that Part A is to be discontinued and will be replaced by Part B (as information only).

By that handle the BOM update manually, the very same day when the actual implementation is, do the update of super BOM and phantom BOM with local DCN instead?

Would this be possible, and would this affect anything negative? 

2. Would any sales history be transferred from the old part no to the new material?

Hope you understand what I mean, thankful for any reply that might help me.

/Erik

entry.title: MB52 库存显示数据与实际库存不符，如何排查差异？
entry.content: 我使用 MB52 查看库存情况时，发现显示的库存数据与我们实际盘点的库存数据不符。我已经确认过库存移动操作都正常进行，并且没有明显的过账错误。那么可能是哪些原因导致了这种差异呢 我应该如何着手排查这种差异，找出问题所在呢 希望能得到大家的帮助，谢谢！

entry.title: Trigger manually follow up survey in LMS
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

I know that is it possible for the admin to manually trigger feedback survey in SAP LMS. I would like to know if it is possible to trigger manually follow up survey in SAP LMS. It seems that no but I want to be sure.

Thanks in advance.

 

Best regards.

entry.title: Re: Resource related Intercompany billing, IC Sales Order control
entry.content: I am also experiencing the same issue. DP93 still taking the old order even after rejecting line item on order. Did you manage to get an answers?

entry.title: Re: What kind of knowledge should a beginner need to prep...
entry.content:
Hi,

 

SAP software does a lot, it depends on what kind of tasks you have to do. Companies are organized differentely. Depending also on the needs of the company, also how they are organized and structured. Some will have certain roles, while others won't have them.

 

So this depends really on what kind of modules, you will work on. If you work solely in logistics, you won't need to know the different bank statement file formats and how they are mapped, etc.

 

So this is not something, which can be easily answered.

 

Best,

Edrilan Berisha

entry.title: Re: Replicate same source object with different target na...
entry.content: You can have multiple replication flows and acheive it in multiple files.

entry.title: Re: MDC Customer Add Custom Table Missing Data on Entity
entry.content: The solution is in this guide LINK and in the BAdI to implement to write the required entity.

entry.title: 回复： the creation of material master data
entry.content: Hello, the following are some of my viewpoints.：When creating new material master data, to ensure correct setup of valuation classes and accounting entries for accurate reflection of financial costs and values, one should understand business requirements, clarify product classification and costing methods, refer to company standards and policies, enhance staff training, use templates and predefined settings, conduct verification and testing, and promote cross - departmental collaboration.

entry.title: 回复： Operating problems of the SAP system #sap
entry.content: Here are some methods to improve the performance of the SAP system: Hardware Level: Upgrade Disks: Replace mechanical hard drives with solid-state drives (SSDs). Increase Memory: Appropriately add more server memory. Upgrade CPU: Choose a higher-performance multicore CPU. Database Level: Optimize SQL Statements: Avoid using inefficient writing methods. Create Indexes: Create appropriate indexes based on query conditions and frequently accessed fields. Adjust Database Parameters: Based on hardware resources and business load conditions. Application Level: Code Optimization: Check loops, nesting, and other structures in ABAP programs. Here are the methods to monitor the usage of hardware resources such as CPU and memory in the SAP system: Operating System Monitor: Enter the operating system monitor through transaction code ST06. Performance Analysis Tool: Use transaction ST05 for performance tracking, recording all database accesses on the instance. ABAP Runtime Analysis Tool: Open the ABAP runtime analysis tool through transaction SE30.

entry.title: Re: SOS
entry.content: If the batch - related issues are not properly resolved, how can we ensure the effective implementation of product batch traceability in the future? And how can we guarantee the complete and accurate acquisition of the information required for traceability?

I would like to modify the classification of my product in SAP GTS S/4HANA using an appropriate BAdI before it enters the preference calculation. Does anyone have an idea which BAdI would be suitable for this, or if it's even possible?

Best regards.

entry.title: Re: How to connect a HANA cloud database in Local HANA st...
entry.content: It does not work. I have this message error: SAP DBTech JDBC: Cannot connect to jdbc:sap://hana***.eu2.hana.ondemand.com:443 [Data receive failed (socket timeout). : *.*.*.*:65313 -> hana***.eu2.hana.ondemand.com:443 ConnectionID:0 SessionID:0].

entry.title: Trigger repricing of an outbound delivery in ABAP
entry.content:
Hi All, 

I needed to reprice the transport cost conditions on an outbound delivery and found out it was not so straight forward. Probably because most of the time the repricing of a preceding Sales Order would take care of this, SAP never provided a nice FM or BAPI for this.

But sometimes you need to trigger the pricing yourself. For example, in an STO scenario where the preceding document is a PO.

Once I figured it out, I decided to create this little post as there is not much out here on this subject.
Also, this post will serve as my personal paper memory for when I need it again 😉

      PERFORM lieferungsupdate_extern_init(sapmv50a).      "prevent early abort by LEAVE statement in BELEG_SICHERN_POST
      PERFORM transaktion_init(sapmv50a) USING 'VL02'.     "we fake being in VL02
      PERFORM beleg_lesen_simple(sapmv50a) USING <lg_obd>. "read delivery
      PERFORM preisfindung_gesamt(sapmv50a) USING 'B'.     "trigger pricing
      PERFORM beleg_sichern(sapmv50a) USING abap_true.     "save

Please feel free to discuss my soltion

entry.title: Re: UPDATE Handling Unit using API_HANDLINGUNIT does not...
entry.content:
Hi Tony,

please be aware that the HU API was developed for the public cloud and is only enabled to work in on-prem / private cloud environment when you implement BAdI /SCWM/EX_API_CTRL_USE to suppress this error message. Only then you can use the patch call to update weights and dimensions of an existing HU in the on-prem System.

For more info check SNOTE 3216941.

BR Axel

entry.title: Re: What does diffusion mean in sap ？
entry.content: Good question, let me think about it.

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition & SAP Mobile St...
entry.content:
@PetraMi 

To change the language on SAP Mobile Start, please follow the below steps:

Android: Go to device settings > Apps > SAP Start > Language > Select one of the supported languages 

iOS:  Go to device settings > Apps > SAP Start > Preferred Language > Select one of the supported languages 

I hope this helps.

entry.title: How to add custom filter field with ValueHelp to Fiori Elements Filterbar
entry.content:
Hello,

I tried to add a custom filter field to a ListReportPage filterbar. I want to have a multi input field with a value help dialog in it.  

 

    <mdc:Field
        id="AirportFromTo"
        core:require="{handler: 'com/advades/flight/ext/fragment/AirportFromTo'}"
        value="{path: 'filterValues>', type: 'sap.fe.macros.filter.type.Value', formatOptions: { operator: 'com.advades.flight.ext.fragment.AirportFromTo.filterItems' }}"
    />
sap.ui.define(["sap/ui/model/Filter", "sap/ui/model/FilterOperator"], function (Filter, FilterOperator) {
    "use strict";
    return {
        filterItems: function (sValue) {
            debugger;
            return new Filter({
                filters: [
                    new Filter({ path: "AirportFromId", operator: FilterOperator.EQ, value1: sValue }),
                    new Filter({ path: "AirportToId", operator: FilterOperator.EQ, value1: sValue })
                ],
                and: false
            });
        }
    };
});

 

The filtering is working like expected but the value help is missing. 

I tried it also with a macros:Field but it didnt work. 

In my opinion there should be a easy way to add in custom filter without building the value help dialog by myself.

entry.title: SF LMS iContent clean-up approach
entry.content:
Hi,

Considering the fact that for iContent access only one set of credentials is provided, how do you recommend to approach the clean up of the files that are stored there?

Our client is unhappy with the fact that every time they update a SCORM file, a new version is added up, instead of replacing the old one by deleting it and keeping only the newer version. This adds up a lot of unnecessary files on the iContent server which need to be deleted.

Therefore, the Learning team has requested to receive access to the iContent server for several different people, to be able to delete these old files. Since it is not possible to create additional accesses, we were wondering how do you usually recommend approaching this situation?

Thanks a lot!

entry.title: Consume Datasphere OData from S4 on premise
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm trying to consume Datasphere OData with an OAuth 2.0 token using S4 on-premise 2023. I understand that the system may not be able to consume the service via the OData Service Consumption Model, though I might be mistaken.

Following this guide GUIDE LINK I tried to create a profile and consume the service by ABAP program. However, something went wrong when I tested the profile using transaction OA2C_GRANT and the program itself.

Is there another way to consume this type of OData? Has anyone else solved this issue?

Thank you in advance

Antonio

entry.title: Re: Sci-Kit learn library in SAP Datasphere Data Flow
entry.content:
Hi Moritz,

Numpy and Pandas libraries are supported in script component of Datasphere Dataflow.

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_DATASPHERE/c8a54ee704e94e15926551293243fd1d/73e8ba1a69cd4eeba722b458a253779d.html

Regards

Githen

I see you are a newcomer to SAP Community - please explore and get active there. We currently have 79 SAP Champions in our program from around the world. You can read more about what it takes to make a great SAP Champion and how to be nominated. Thanks for your interest!

entry.title: Re: gCTS - Error WRITE_MANIFEST_FILE File handler cannot write file during CLONE of Github repositor
entry.content:
Hi,
I am a bit surprised that the issue comes up when cloning. and not when creating the repository. You could nevertheless check whether the vSID was created successfully in STMS. In addition, this issue can come up if the permissions for writing to the gcts-Folder are not set or if the java-path is incorrect. 

kind regards

Karin

entry.title: Change Exchange Rate Type in Credit Risk Management
entry.content:
1. Chanage the exchange rate type from M to MBDS
  2. Currency_Conversion_Error occurs after changing the exchange rate type to MBDS from M in the credit segment for the UKM customer during creatin of Sales orders with exchange rate type MBDS.
  • Credit Limit process change exchange rate type M to MBDS.
  • Create sales order with the exchange rate type MBDS
  • ABAP Dump.

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Change Exchange Rate Type in Credit Risk Management
entry.content:
Maintain the currency conversion setting for the Exchange rate type MBDS. You can refer the same from SAP KBA LINK:  https://me.sap.com/notes/3367932 

Please discuss with the financial expert to test the currency settings in your test system before implementing in the production system. I have provided the screenshot for the company code currency settings in your system. 

As per our discussion please find the relevant links for defining the additional currency types.

In the meeting we have discuss the creation of additional currency types https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/0fa84c9d9c634132b7c4abb9ffdd8f06/5485fb2fbc7e488c8b85b22ee754c7d9.html?locale=en-US 

Please note:- 

You can only add new currency types for a company code that has not been used yet.

This means that you can only add an additional currency for a company code if the following conditions are true for your complete system landscape:
  • No journal entries have been posted for the company code.
  • If actual costing is activated: No changes have been made to the accounting attributes of materials that are relevant for actual costing (price determination = 3) in the company code.
Otherwise, a check blocks currency configuration changes.

If postings have been made in a system other than your production (P) system, however, you can delete these by using the job template Reset Transaction Data from the app Schedule Accounting Data Changes.

You create a company code using the Organizational Structure configuration activity. In your configuration environment, use the search function to find and open this activity. For more information, see Creating a Company Code.

 

As functional currency, you can use the company code currency (10), the group currency (30), that is, the predefined SAP currency types, or your own currency type (namespace Y*, Z*).

Note:- As soon as you make postings to a company code, you can no longer change the functional currency. 

Procedure https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/0fa84c9d9c634132b7c4abb9ffdd8f06/2eb17eee8caf41c7958b72de54874e22.html?version=2502.VAL#procedure 

Procedure Change of functional currency:- https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/0fa84c9d9c634132b7c4abb9ffdd8f06/73c10be5deac49c993956ab3281c9ea1.html?version=2502.VAL#procedure

entry.title: Re: Visual Studio code fiori application deployment fails with status code 500
entry.content: @MioYasutakeHi, please note that i've had to recreate the application as I had some npm errors, however all the abap repository names and url are the same. Kindly find the reponse below:

entry.title: Jumpstart your SAP RISE Project with SAP Cloud ALM
entry.content:
For a SAP RISE project, SAP Cloud ALM offers many accelerators that you can use out of the box to set up your project. In this blog post I would like to describe how to get started.

1. Create a Project by using SAP Activate Roadmap

  • Choose the SAP Activate Roadmap "RISE with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition - Implementation"

2. Create a Scope and choose the Solution Scenarios

  • Create a Scope and choose the relevant Solution Scenarios

3. Review the proposed roadmap tasks

  • Check the standard tasks, create additional ones or delete unnecessary ones

4. Review the Quality Gates

  • Check the predefined Quality Gates and schedule them for the right timebox
  • Create additional Quality Qates with Checklists

5. Additional functionalities

Use other desired functions such as Requirements Management, Test Management, Release Management, etc.

entry.title: Re: currency_conversion() function is showing error for c...
entry.content: The error says reference information missing. Try to give currency code reference like field booking_fee because audcurr also an amount field which requires currency reference.

entry.title: Unlocking New Possibilities with the GROW with SAP Premium Package
entry.content:
Last year SAP announced a new packaged solution that bundles various cloud-based solutions:
GROW with SAP. This Blog will focus on the GROW with SAP Premium offering and how it relates to
Spend Management with SAP Concur. 
In today's fast-paced business environment, companies need robust solutions to stay ahead of the curve. With the GROW with SAP Premium package, SAP announced a solution with access to SAP Sales Cloud and SAP Concur Expense. This bundle delivers an embedded integration between SAP Cloud ERP and SAP Concur Expense through SAP ICS. This powerful combination is designed to help organizations streamline their operations, enhance financial visibility, and drive growth. 

What is GROW with SAP? 

GROW with SAP is a comprehensive cloud ERP solution tailored for fast-growing organizations. It consists of SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition targeting midmarket businesses by offering a complete suite of solutions, services, and learning resources to help companies successfully adopt cloud ERP.  

What is GROW with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, Premium? 

GROW with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, premium enriches SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition with features that accelerate development and automation and capabilities for procurement and advanced financial management.  
With the GROW with SAP Premium package, businesses can now access SAP Concur Expense solutions and SAP Sales Cloud, providing a holistic approach to managing their operations. 

What is the new offer? 
The GROW with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, premium Edition with material number 8014761, includes additional entitlements for:  

  • SAP Concur Expense (100 transactions per month)   
  • SAP Sales Cloud (15 users) 

In addition to the above entitlements of GROW with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, the premium package also includes many more features to accelerate development and automation for advanced financial management and procurement. 
Find more details here: https://www.sap.com/products/erp/grow/how-to-buy.html   

What is SAP Concur Expense? 

SAP Concur Expense empowers organizations to enforce spend management policies, adapt to changing requirements and regulations, and future-proof their organizations. Use SAP Concur Expense to simplify, automate and manage employee spending from receipt capture to reimbursement. Plus, with the SAP Concur mobile app, employees and supervisors can effectively manage their travel and spending from any location, on any device.  

The GROW with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, premium package includes the following:  

  • Concur Expense including 100 expense reports per month 
  • Analytics Reporting 
  • SAP Integration with Concur between SAP Concur Expense and SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition via SAP ICS. 

How is SAP Concur Expense integrated in the offering? 

The integration of SAP Concur Expense with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition is managed through the embedded financial integration module known as SAP ICS. 
This integration ensures that all expense data is fully synchronized, providing organizations with end-to-end visibility of their spending in near real-time. Here are some key benefits: 

  • Enhanced Financial Visibility: With Concur Expense, businesses can manage their employee spend quickly, simply, and accurately. The integration provides complete visibility into business expenses, allowing companies to evaluate trends and identify potential cost savings.  
  • Streamlined Operations through Automation: The seamless data synchronization between Concur Expense and SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition ensures that organizations can manage their expenses efficiently. This integration eliminates the need for manual data entry, reducing errors and saving time while providing timely and accurate reimbursements.  
  • Improved Decision-Making: By leveraging the powerful analytics and reporting capabilities of Concur Expense, businesses can gain valuable insights into their spending patterns. This information can be used to make informed decisions and optimize performance.  

How is GROW with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, Premium delivered? 

The GROW with SAP Premium package is delivered as a ready-to-run service (SaaS) with pre-configured industry best practices and automated system provisioning. GROW with SAP delivers a ready-to-run SaaS ERP backed by 50 years of industry experience. When combined with Concur Expense, organizations can unlock new possibilities and drive significant growth. 

Conclusion 

The GROW with SAP Premium package, including the seamless integration between SAP Cloud ERP and SAP Concur Expense, is a game-changer for businesses looking to enhance their financial visibility and streamline their operations. By leveraging this powerful combination, organizations can stay ahead of the competition and achieve their growth objectives. 

For more information about the GROW with SAP Premium package and how it can benefit your organization, visit https://www.sap.com/products/erp/grow.html .

entry.title: Re: Problem when calling a method from an include program
entry.content:
I guess you have here a problem with mutable variables.

When I look at the code it is very inconsistent with the use of global variables, static methods and performs.

Why you don't try to clean code this.

Maybe it will also help, if we see a bit more from the code, especially the second call, where you get the differing results.

entry.title: Identifying Final vs Partial Confirmation in DM
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I need assistance in identifying whether a confirmation in DM is a final confirmation or a partial confirmation, without solely relying on the Integration Message Dashboard.

Details:

  • Current Process:
    We currently use the Integration Message Dashboard to identify the confirmation status. The dashboard clearly displays PCNF (Partial Confirmation) and CNF (Final Confirmation).

  • Issue:
    We are searching for an alternative method to determine the confirmation status directly in DM, as we want to reduce dependency on the Integration Message Dashboard.

  • Requirement:
    Is there a specific method, transaction, or field within DM that can help us identify whether a confirmation is partial or final?

Any guidance, suggestions, or insights would be greatly appreciated. Thank you in advance for your support!

SAP Digital Manufacturing 

@ManoelCosta

entry.title: How to build an "Export the whole Object Page" button for RAP Fiori App
entry.content:
My customer has developed an own Fiori App (OData V2) in their S/4HANA 2023 Private Cloud System, using the RAP-OData-Fiori Elements stack. The current requirements is to build an "Export the whole Object Page" button that enables exporting the entire Object Page content, including the header and all the content from the tabs(lists), to a PDF or Excel file.

The question is: according to best practices, how should this functionality be implemented?

  • Should the logic be written on the backend, using a RAP unmanaged scenario to build the custom action button? Are there any ABAP APIs that can be used for this purpose?

  • Or should it be written on the frontend, extending Fiori Elements through a UI Adaptation Project?

  • Alternatively, is there any out-of-box product or BTP service that can help achieve this functionality (download/export the Object Page Content)?

     
     

Thanks in advance!

 

Best regards,

Liu

entry.title: Re: Comparing depreciation areas
entry.content:
Hi Filip,

The general answer to this would be no.
But you can check if the same can be developed by a custom App. 
Custom apps can be created via custom analytical queries app or with view browser app. On the HelpPortal you can find multiple articles describing the possibility.

entry.title: Re: Document Type doesn't exist in Layout and Sequence wi...
entry.content: Please, run the following query and post the result here: SELECT * FROM RDOC WHERE "DocCode" = 'CSI4'

entry.title: Re: How to refresh the token for a OAuth 2.0 Client via R...
entry.content: No, we are still going to OA2C_CONFIG every day. I have reported this issue, but did not get a solution

entry.title: Re: I need production order cost with all Production issu...
entry.content:
Thank dear for Positive reply @Manish . I need date wise access of all history as running cost of production  

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

SELECT DISTINCT T0."DocEntry", T0."DocNum", T0."ItemCode", T0."ProdName",SUM(T1."Quantity"*T1."StockPrice"),SUM(T2."Quantity"*T2."StockPrice")

FROM OWOR T0

Left JOIN IGE1 T1 ON T1."BaseEntry" =T0."DocEntry" AND T1."BaseRef" = T0."DocNum" AND T1."BaseType" =202

Left JOIN IGN1 T2 ON T2."BaseEntry" =T0."DocEntry"

WHERE T1."PostDate" >=[%0\] AND T1."PostDate" <=[%1\]

GROUP BY T0."DocEntry",T0."DocNum",T0."ItemCode", T0."ProdName"

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

entry.title: Equipment Valid from & to
entry.content:
Equipment is available at Plant 2 from 01.01.2025 to 10.01.2025 at location 1133.The same equipment is available from 11.01.2025 to 31.01.9999 at location 1118.When searching for equipment at location 1118 for the date range 01.02.2025 to 28.02.2025, the system should show availability only for Plant 2 during that range.

The equipment’s availability data, including the start and end dates, is stored in the V_Fleet table.

We need logic for ABAP.

PLM Enterprise Asset Management (EAM)/Plant Maintenance (PM)

SAP Plant Connectivity SAP Asset Strategy and Performance Management

entry.title: How to show a busy indicator in story while the table values load from live connection?
entry.content:
Hi,

I have created a story where I'm pulling the data from SAP source via live connection. There are multiple widgets in the story and few tables and charts are using this SAP live data source to pull the data into the story. When the story loads for the first time, there is some delay in refreshing the data for the widgets which pulls data from live data source. My requirement is to show a custom message/ busy indicator to the users until all the data in these widgets is refreshed within the story. I'm not sure if there is a specific function which tells me that the data refresh is completed from the live connection so that I can write the script accordingly.   

Anyone who has faced this similar issue or knows the workaround in this case. Their comments would be deeply appreciated.

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Tolling, Plant Abroad and Intercompany - Whats the difference
Re: ASSERTION_FAILED or FAA_CMP Errors in tcode AJAB and OAAQ and FAA_CMP and OAAR
entry.content:
Hi, 

I got the same error while try to close the year 2023 in asset accounting with the transaction code AJAB. 

Then I checked the transfer date in FAA_CMP at date is 01.01.2023. when I try to change the date into 01.01.2024 it does not allowed to change the date and giving the error "Transfer date 01.01.2024 is more than one year after the closed fiscal year. |Message No. AC187" 

Also in ledger settings, closed fiscal year is 2022.

What should I do next?

entry.title: Re: Error : Production Order change status : CLOSE
entry.content:

You can try to deactivate all the approval procedures too.

Best regards

entry.title: Employee Sign In issue while accessing Internal Career site powered by CSB
entry.content:
We have enable Internal Career site powered by CSB.

We have followed all the steps below: https://community.sap.com/t5/human-capital-management-blogs-by-members/setting-up-ias-for-recruiting-internal-career-site/ba-p/13536356

When the employee is trying to go to careers tab and click on it, it lands on Sign On Page. Can anyone tell me why is it happening.

I have already tried to fix it by

  1. Deleting Mange data -> the Recruiting Career Single Sign-On Configuration
  2. Go to SuccessFactors -> Career Site Identity Provider (IDP) configuration -> switch ON SAML Integration and maintained Tenant Name (copied from IAS)  -> Save

But the issue is not getting resolved. Have you guys ever experienced this issue?

entry.title: Re: Trade Compliance and Customs Process with SAP Transportation Management for Shippers in SAP S/4H

Also FYI for those interested, there are 2 free upcoming Live sessions in the SAP Learning hub from a GTS consultant on the topic of Extended Warehouse integration with GTS: 

https://learning.sap.com/live-sessions/integrating-sap-extended-warehouse-management-into-the-import-process-in-the-european-union

entry.title: Re: Copy document header UDF form settings from one user...
entry.content:
Hi @PhoebeYeo , 

AFAIK, "Form Settings" functionality applied to preferences and settings in the document grid area and not in the header. 

Regards,

Maya

entry.title: Re: Why do we need to integrate SAP public cloud asset ma...
entry.content:
Hi,

Short answer is that No it is not mandatory, you do not need to activate this for S/4HANA Public Cloud and will not have any impact on your core Asset Management processes in S/4HANA if you choose not to integrate to it.

For some more detailed context if you want it..

SAP needed a way that we could extract data out of the core system (S/4HANA) and then provide that same data model to other cloud based applications in our Intelligent Asset Management portfolio. These were other solutions such as 'Asset Strategy and Performance Management', 'Predictive Asset Insights', 'Business Network for Asset Collaboration'.

That data was extracted and stored in a central place on the cloud (Asset Central) that the other applications could then integrate with as a common data model. So there was a prerequisite that if you were using those applications, then you would need to use Asset Central to integrate to them. S/4HANA <-> Asset Central <-> Other cloud applications.

As a note, things are moving on from that. For example, if your company wants to use our other applications such as 'Asset Performance Management' now, it uses direct odata connections to integrate with S/4HANA. The only solution that still uses Asset Central is Business Network for Asset Collaboration (BNAC), but its current integration with public cloud is a limited subset of data and processes.

Tim

entry.title: Re: Managing AI Models with SAP AI Core on BTP: Setup to Deployment Using Docker, GitHub & Objec
entry.content: Great job, Abhijeet!

entry.title: Re: What does diffusion mean in sap ？
entry.content: good

entry.title: Re: A warm welcome to our new SAP Champions in January 2025
entry.content: A big congratulations and a warm welcome to all of new SAP Champions! 🎉

entry.title: Re: Stock Transport for Quality Stock (with Inspection Lot) and Blocked Stock
entry.content:
Dear Pyro,

With SPM customizing you will get a new field in the STO, under Delivery task. Please check. The field is called "Type of Stock". In order to manage the process, that field shoud be aligned to the real stock type in MMBE. So, for example, for quarantine stock the field should be changed from "Unrestricted" (default value) to Q - Quality stock. 

I hope this is helpful for you.

entry.title: Re: Passing values in Input Parameters - Variables of Datasphere Model from Power BI
entry.content: This is Import Connection @maxpinato_horsa @AnkurGoyal03

entry.title: Re: Intent-based Navigation - semanticObjectAction annota...
entry.content:
Hello,
try with 

 

type: #WITH_INTENT_BASED_NAVIGATION

 

Regards,
Patrick

entry.title: Re: Should we take the backup of IBP Test & IBP Productio...
entry.content:
Hi @saranya4,

as far as I remember, the planning area is immediatly active after uploading the time profile. However you need to be careful not to change key fields or even change the numbering. Download the assigned time profile, "just" change the description like proposed by SAP and upload the whole file again.

Please read the following SAP documentation first:
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_INTEGRATED_BUSINESS_PLANNING/bf99e931b8d44aafb4e306ec3602cbdd/60e0285729046359e10000000a44147b.html?locale=en-US

BR, Peter

entry.title: Re: Agents is the most important BTP release this 2024
entry.content: Thanks for the great blog!

entry.title: Partner Consolidation Unit is blank in ACDOCA
entry.content:
Dear SAP Gurus,

Scenario: GRPL is activated, so when data posted/loaded in RTR certain GR fields also can be viewed as per the GR Master Data (for eg: FS Item, Consolidation Unit, Sub Item Partner Consolidation Unit etc..) 

Usually Trading partner = Partner consolidation unit but I'm currently facing partner consolidation unit is blank for below company codes in ACDOCA table.

3 company codes created (1000, 2000 and 3000) in S4 HANA and the same has been created as consolidation units in Group Reporting.

Data Loaded in S4HANA by Data migration team ACDOCA fields are populated with Trading Partner where ever Affiliates transactions are posted. But Partner Consolidation unit is blank may I know what's missing.

Note: Business has 100 + company codes but only issue with those 3 company codes above used as trading partners. for eg affiliated transaction with trading partner 1000 in ACDOCA Group Reporting Partner consolidation unit is blank.

Thanks,

Shekher

entry.title: Not able to identity Revenue GL account configured in EK02 for Invoice
entry.content:
Hi All,

I'm unable to locate revenue GL account in Invoice document even though it is present in EK02.

Screenshots for your reference:

EK02 

please help

entry.title: Re: Issue with UTCTOLOCAL Function in Data Flows (SAP Dat...
entry.content:
Hi,

You can try using the below option:

TO_DATE(UTCTOLOCAL (CURRENT_UTCTIMESTAMP, 'EST') )

https://help.sap.com/docs/HANA_SERVICE_CF/7c78579ce9b14a669c1f3295b0d8ca16/20f52f4475191014a1089242486060c1.html

entry.title: Re: Modifying Product Classification Prior to Preference...
entry.content:
Hello,

Possible BAdIs for Modifying Product Classification in SAP GTS S/4HANA:

BADI_CUS_GTS_CLASSIFICATION_DETERMINE: This BAdI allows you to influence the determination of the classification for a product in GTS. You can use this to:
Modify the classification: Change the assigned classification based on your specific business rules.
Influence classification determination: Modify the logic used to determine the classification.
How to Implement:

Create an Implementation: Create a new implementation for the BADI_CUS_GTS_CLASSIFICATION_DETERMINE.
Implement the Method: Implement the method IF_EX_CUS_GTS_CLASSIFICATION_DETERMINE~DETERMINE. This method provides you with the necessary information about the product and allows you to modify the classification.
Activate the Implementation: Activate your implementation in the IMG.
Example Code Snippet:

ABAP

METHOD IF_EX_CUS_GTS_CLASSIFICATION_DETERMINE~DETERMINE.

DATA: ls_classification TYPE /SAPSLL/CL_GTS_CLASSIFICATION=>TY_CLASSIFICATION.

* Get the current classification
* ...

* Modify the classification based on your business rules
* ...

* Set the modified classification
* ls_classification-CLASSIFICATION = 'YOUR_NEW_CLASSIFICATION'.

ENDMETHOD.
Important Considerations:

Business Requirements: Carefully define your business rules for product classification modification.
Testing: Thoroughly test your implementation in a test environment before moving to production.
Documentation: Document your implementation for future maintenance and troubleshooting.
Disclaimer:    Tiktok video downloader

This information is for guidance only and may not be suitable for all scenarios.
Always consult the SAP documentation and best practices for specific implementation details.

 

Best Regards
